name: DynAMoS — Dynamic Affect in Social Interaction
description: A multimodal dataset of naturalistic dyadic social interactions with synchronized audio, video, and facial-behavior coding from 83 adults. Designed for studying dynamic affect, facial expression, and communication during real conversations.
citation: Girard JM, et al. (2023). DynAMoS: the Dynamic Affective Movie Clip and Social Interaction dataset. ACII 2023.
